#define ADD_ATTR ( ATTR)
Value:
{ \
if (ATTR.Val != 0) \
hashAttribute(ATTR, Tag); \

#define COLLECT_ATTR ( NAME)
Value:
case dwarf::NAME: \
Attrs.NAME.Val = Values[i]; \
Attrs.NAME.Desc = &Abbrevs.getData()[i]; \
break
